14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Lode - lifecycle REST (guard-free cluster, sourced by rbld0_Lode):
20	#   divine — enumerate every Lode by touchmark (read-only)
21	#   augur  — inspect one Lode: member tags + decoded rbi_vouch envelope (read-only)
22	#   banish — delete a whole Lode (Director credentials)
23	
24	set -euo pipefail
25	
26	######################################################################
27	# External Functions (rbld_*)
28	
29	rbld_divine() {
30	  zrbld_sentinel
31	
32	  buc_doc_brief "Divine Lodes — enumerate every Lode by touchmark (read-only)"
33	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
34	
35	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
36	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
37	    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
38	  local z_token=""
39	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
40	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
41	
42	  buc_step "Enumerating Lodes under ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/"
43	  zrbfc_list_anchors_capture "${z_token}" "${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}"
44	
45	  if ! test -s "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"; then
46	    buc_info "No Lodes found under ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/"
47	    buc_success "Divine complete — 0 Lodes"
48	    return 0
49	  fi
50	
51	  # Kind-letter legend, printed once so rows carry no repeated per-row column.
52	  # A touchmark's leading letter is its kind (b260602075327 -> bole); the
53	  # reader decodes the prefix from this key. One entry per implemented kind.
54	  local -r z_kind_fmt="    %-3s %-13s %s\n"
55	  echo ""
56	  printf "  Kinds (touchmark prefix):\n"
57	  printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_BOLE}"         "bole"         "upstream OCI image, consumed as a FROM line"
58	  printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_RELIQUARY}"    "reliquary"    "date-cohort of build-tool images"
59	  printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_WSL}"          "wsl"          "vendor-published rootfs tarball, opaque-blob member"
60	  printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_PODVM_WSL}"    "podvm-wsl"    "podman machine-os-wsl disk leaves, opaque-blob cohort"
61	  printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_PODVM_NATIVE}" "podvm-native" "podman machine-os disk leaves, opaque-blob cohort"
62	
63	  # Load the touchmark list fully before iterating: the per-Lode tags fetch
64	  # spawns curl (via rbuh), and a child touching stdin would consume the
65	  # loop's remaining input. Load-then-iterate keeps that FD closed.
66	  local z_touchmarks=()
67	  local z_touch=""
68	  while IFS= read -r z_touch || test -n "${z_touch}"; do
69	    test -n "${z_touch}" || continue
70	    z_touchmarks+=("${z_touch}")
71	  done < "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"
72	
73	  local -r z_row_fmt="  %-15s %s\n"
74	  echo ""
75	  printf "${z_row_fmt}" "TOUCHMARK" "IMAGE"
76	  printf "${z_row_fmt}" "---------------" "--------------------------------------"
77	
78	  local z_idx=0
79	  local z_pkg=""
80	  local z_pkg_encoded=""
81	  local z_tags_url=""
82	  local z_enum_infix=""
83	  local z_resp_file=""
84	  local z_image_file=""
85	  local z_image=""
86	  for z_idx in "${!z_touchmarks[@]}"; do
87	    z_touch="${z_touchmarks[$z_idx]}"
88	
89	    # One tags-list per Lode. The IMAGE column adapts to the Lode's member
90	    # scheme (the touchmark prefix names the kind; see the legend above). A
91	    # single-image Lode (bole) shows its unsprued fingerprint tag
92	    # <sanitized-origin>-<sha10>, located via the sha10 taken from the
93	    # rbi_sha256-<hex> member tag so Director semantic names (also unsprued)
94	    # cannot masquerade as the fingerprint. A clean-scheme cohort (reliquary)
95	    # carries no digest/fingerprint layer, so it has no single fingerprint to
96	    # show — report its member count instead (every non-:rbi_vouch tag is a
97	    # member). Per-Lode infix preserves each response for forensics.
98	    z_pkg="${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touch}"
99	    z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg//\//%2F}"
100	    z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1000"
101	    z_enum_infix="rbld_divine_enum_${z_idx}"
102	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_enum_infix}"
103	    rbuh_require_ok "List tags for Lode ${z_touch}" "${z_enum_infix}"
104	    z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_enum_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
105	
106	    z_image_file="${ZRBLD_DIVINE_PREFIX}enum_${z_idx}_image.txt"
107	    jq -r --arg dp "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_DIGEST_PREFIX}" --arg vouch "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH}" '
108	      [.tags[]?.name | sub(".*/tags/"; "")] as $names
109	      | ([$names[] | select(startswith($dp)) | ltrimstr($dp)[0:10]][0]) as $sha10
110	      | ([$names[] | select((startswith("rbi_") | not) and ($sha10 != null) and endswith("-" + $sha10))][0]) as $fingerprint
111	      | if $fingerprint != null then $fingerprint
112	        else "(cohort: \([$names[] | select(. != $vouch)] | length) members)"
113	        end
114	    ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_image_file}" \
115	      || buc_die "Failed to summarize Lode ${z_touch}"
116	    z_image=$(<"${z_image_file}")
117	    test -n "${z_image}" || buc_die "Empty summary extraction for Lode ${z_touch}"
118	
119	    printf "${z_row_fmt}" "${z_touch}" "${z_image}"
120	  done
121	  echo ""
122	  buc_info "Total Lodes: ${#z_touchmarks[@]}"
123	  buc_success "Divine complete"
124	}
125	
126	rbld_augur() {
127	  zrbld_sentinel
128	
129	  local -r z_touchmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
130	
131	  buc_doc_brief "Augur a Lode — inspect member tags and decode its rbi_vouch provenance envelope (read-only)"
132	  buc_doc_param "touchmark" "Lode stamp to inspect (e.g., b260602120000)"
133	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
134	
135	  test -n "${z_touchmark}" || buc_die "Touchmark parameter required"
136	  [[ "${z_touchmark}" =~ ^[a-z]+[0-9]{12}$ ]] \
137	    || buc_die "Touchmark format invalid: '${z_touchmark}' (expected <kind><YYMMDDHHMMSS>, e.g. b260602120000)"
138	
139	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
140	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
141	    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
142	  local z_token=""
143	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
144	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
145	
146	  local -r z_pkg="${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touchmark}"
147	  local -r z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg//\//%2F}"
148	
149	  # Member tags — every tag on the Lode package. An empty package is the
150	  # "Lode not present" signal (matches divine's enumerate contract).
151	  buc_step "Fetching member tags for Lode ${z_pkg}"
152	  local -r z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1000"
153	  local -r z_tags_infix="rbld_augur_tags"
154	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_tags_infix}"
155	  rbuh_require_ok "List tags for Lode ${z_touchmark}" "${z_tags_infix}"
156	
157	  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_tags_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
158	  local -r z_tags_file="${ZRBLD_AUGUR_PREFIX}tags.txt"
159	  jq -r '.tags[]?.name | sub(".*/tags/"; "")' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_tags_file}" \
160	    || buc_die "Failed to extract member tags for Lode ${z_touchmark}"
161	  test -s "${z_tags_file}" \
162	    || buc_die "No member tags found under ${z_pkg} — Lode not present in registry"
163	
164	  local z_tags=()
165	  local z_tag=""
166	  while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
167	    test -n "${z_tag}" || continue
168	    z_tags+=("${z_tag}")
169	  done < "${z_tags_file}"
170	
171	  echo ""
172	  printf "  Member tags (%s):\n" "${#z_tags[@]}"
173	  for z_tag in "${z_tags[@]}"; do
174	    printf "    %s\n" "${z_tag}"
175	  done
176	
177	  # Provenance envelope — extract the :rbi_vouch FROM-scratch artifact and read
178	  # its vouch.json layer. This is the inspect depth divine never carried: the
179	  # acquisition facts and the honest trust-grade posture. The same gcrane-pushed
180	  # single-layer image rbgjl02 wrote (vouch.json at image root).
181	  buc_step "Decoding provenance envelope (:${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH})"
182	  local -r z_vouch_dir="${ZRBLD_AUGUR_PREFIX}vouch"
183	  rm -rf "${z_vouch_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to clear vouch scratch dir: ${z_vouch_dir}"
184	  zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_pkg}" "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH}" "${z_vouch_dir}" \
185	    || buc_die "No :${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH} envelope at ${z_pkg} — not a vouched Lode (capture incomplete or a legacy artifact)"
186	  local -r z_vouch_json="${z_vouch_dir}/vouch.json"
187	  test -f "${z_vouch_json}" \
188	    || buc_die "Envelope artifact present but vouch.json missing for ${z_touchmark}"
189	
190	  # Kind name comes from the envelope's own kind field — the kind-agnostic source
191	  # (a new Lode kind needs no change here; the prefix letter is shown as a cross-check).
192	  local z_trust=""
193	  z_trust=$(jq -r '.trust_grade // "(absent)"' "${z_vouch_json}") \
194	    || buc_die "Failed to read trust_grade from envelope for ${z_touchmark}"
195	
196	  echo ""
197	  printf "  Provenance envelope (:%s):\n" "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH}"
198	  jq -r '
199	    "    Kind:          \(.kind // "(absent)")",
200	    "    Lode:          \(.lode // "(absent)")",
201	    "    Schema:        \(.schema // "(absent)")",
202	    "    Acquired at:   \(.acquired_at // "(absent)")",
203	    "    Acquired by:   \(.acquired_by // "(absent)")",
204	    "    Capture build: \(.capture_build // "(absent)")",
205	    "    Signature:     \(if .signature == null then "(unsigned)" else .signature end)",
206	    "    Trust grade:   \(.trust_grade // "(absent)")",
207	    "",
208	    "    Members (\((.members // []) | length)):",
209	    ((.members // [])[] |
210	      "      \(.name // "(unnamed)")",
211	      "        origin:       \(.origin // "(absent)")",
212	      "        digest:       \(.digest // "(absent)")",
213	      "        verification: \(.verification // "(absent)")",
214	      "        tags:         \((.tags // []) | join(", "))")
215	  ' "${z_vouch_json}" \
216	    || buc_die "Failed to render provenance envelope for ${z_touchmark}"
217	
218	  # Honest trust posture — never over-claim what the upstream permits (the Pale).
219	  echo ""
220	  case "${z_trust}" in
221	    "${RBGC_LODE_TRUST_VERIFIED}")
222	      printf "  Trust posture: %s\n" "${z_trust}"
223	      printf "    Bytes remain re-checkable against the published upstream — an OCI\n"
224	      printf "    content-address on a durable registry, or a vendor-published checksum.\n"
225	      ;;
226	    "${RBGC_LODE_TRUST_RECORDED}")
227	      printf "  Trust posture: %s\n" "${z_trust}"
228	      printf "    RB attests only the digest observed at capture: the upstream offers no\n"
229	      printf "    durable re-checkable reference, so the claim never implies the bytes\n"
230	      printf "    remain verifiable against a vanished source.\n"
231	      ;;
232	    *)
233	      printf "  Trust posture: %s (unrecognized grade — displayed verbatim)\n" "${z_trust}"
234	      ;;
235	  esac
236	
237	  echo ""
238	  buc_success "Augur complete — Lode ${z_touchmark}"
239	}
240	
241	rbld_banish() {
242	  zrbld_sentinel
243	
244	  local -r z_touchmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
245	
246	  buc_doc_brief "Banish a Lode — delete the whole rbi_ld/<touchmark> GAR package"
247	  buc_doc_param "touchmark" "Lode stamp to delete (e.g., b260602120000)"
248	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
249	
250	  test -n "${z_touchmark}" || buc_die "Touchmark parameter required"
251	
252	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
253	  local z_token=""
254	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
255	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
256	
257	  local -r z_pkg="${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touchmark}"
258	  local -r z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg//\//%2F}"
259	
260	  # Verify presence before delete so banish reports a clean not-found.
261	  buc_step "Verifying Lode present: ${z_pkg}"
262	  local -r z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1"
263	  local -r z_probe_infix="rbld_banish_probe"
264	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_probe_infix}"
265	  rbuh_require_ok "Probe Lode ${z_touchmark}" "${z_probe_infix}"
266	
267	  local z_tag_count=""
268	  z_tag_count=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_probe_infix}" '(.tags // []) | length') \
269	    || buc_die "Failed to count tags for ${z_pkg}"
270	  test "${z_tag_count}" -gt 0 \
271	    || buc_die "No Lode found at ${z_pkg} — nothing to banish"
272	
273	  buc_require "Will banish the whole Lode ${z_pkg} (cloud-dispatched delete)" "yes"
274	
275	  # Cloud-dispatched delete: a Director-run build deletes the package in-pool by
276	  # convergence (GAR's parent-before-child FAILED_PRECONDITION; absence-poll to
277	  # 404 is the only success signal) — the build's success IS the delete outcome,
278	  # closing the host trust-200 LRO gap; see RBSCB and rbgjl06.
279	  buc_step "Dispatching cloud delete for Lode package: ${z_pkg}"
280	  zrbld_cloud_delete_dispatch "${z_token}" "Banish" "${ZRBLD_BANISH_PREFIX}" "${z_pkg}"
281	
282	  echo ""
283	  buc_success "Lode banished: ${z_touchmark}"
284	}
285	
286	# eof
287

200	
201	  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
202	  # Top-level namespaces under which arks are stored. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
203	  # The hm/rq siblings hold Director-authored image families; rbi_df holds
204	  # Payor-authored depot-scoped OCI artifacts produced during depot lifetime.
205	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="rbi_hm"
206	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="rbi_rq"
207	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_DEPOT_FACTS="rbi_df"
208	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_LODES="rbi_ld"
209	
210	  # GAR Lode Layout (fetched-side universal capture — see RBSL)
211	  # One Lode = one GAR package named rbi_ld/<kind-letter><stamp>; that package
212	  # IS the atomic-delete unit (single `packages delete`). Members and provenance
213	  # ride as TAGS within the one package, never as /-path-segments (GAR has no
214	  # subtree delete). Stamp matches the hallmark second-granular form YYMMDDHHMMSS.
215	  #
216	  # Kind letters (one per capture kind; podvm carries two for its quay families):
217	  #   b  bole | r  reliquary | w  wsl | vw  podvm-wsl | vn  podvm-native
218	  # Five kinds, not six: the single-tool kind ('t') was dropped as non-load-
219	  # bearing — it split from reliquary on cardinality alone, has no consumer
220	  # (tool images are only ever consumed as a co-versioned cohort), and the
221	  # package layer already carries 1-vs-N for free (RBSL "Why five kinds, not four").
222	  readonly RBGC_LODE_KIND_BOLE="b"
223	  readonly RBGC_LODE_KIND_RELIQUARY="r"
224	  readonly RBGC_LODE_KIND_WSL="w"
225	  readonly RBGC_LODE_KIND_PODVM_WSL="vw"
226	  readonly RBGC_LODE_KIND_PODVM_NATIVE="vn"
227	
228	  # Kind-brand enum — the touchmark's kind carried in the host-side single-form
229	  # chaining fact a derived-pull election reads to resolve the member tag. It is
230	  # read as its own fact, NOT parsed from the touchmark's kind-letter prefix
231	  # (the chaining channel is single-form: opaque values, never parsed). Each kind
232	  # adds its brand here with its vertical; the brand string is also the envelope's
233	  # `kind` field, and — for podvm — the operator-typed `immure` family argument.
234	  readonly RBGC_LODE_BRAND_BOLE="bole"
235	  readonly RBGC_LODE_BRAND_RELIQUARY="reliquary"
236	  readonly RBGC_LODE_BRAND_WSL="wsl"
237	  readonly RBGC_LODE_BRAND_PODVM_WSL="podvm-wsl"
238	  readonly RBGC_LODE_BRAND_PODVM_NATIVE="podvm-native"
239	
240	  # Member/provenance tags. The rbi_ sprue marks strings from RB's domain:
241	  # RB's authored lexicon (bole, vouch) and RB-measured-from-content values
242	  # (the digest). It does NOT mark foreign-cued strings — the sanitized-origin
243	  # tag is UNSPRUED (origin is a vessel cue), computed at capture, not a constant.
244	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TAG_SPRUE="rbi_"               # RB reserved tag prefix; member tags compose as <sprue><name>
245	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TAG_BOLE="rbi_bole"            # uniform greppable handle (bole singleton)
246	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH="rbi_vouch"          # one-per-Lode provenance envelope
247	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TAG_DIGEST_PREFIX="rbi_sha256-"  # canonical OCI digest tag: rbi_sha256-<full-hex>
248	  # reliquary cohort members carry the clean scheme :<sprue><tool> (e.g. rbi_skopeo)
249	  # — no digest/fingerprint layer; the tool name is RB-authored lexicon, so sprued.
250	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TAG_ROOTFS="rbi_rootfs"        # wsl singleton: the opaque rootfs blob member (RB-authored, sprued)
251	
252	  # Provenance envelope (:rbi_vouch) — two honest trust grades, declared per Lode.
253	  # bole captures the durable-upstream grade; podvm-* will carry the recorded grade.
254	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TRUST_VERIFIED="verified-against-published"
255	  readonly RBGC_LODE_TRUST_RECORDED="recorded-at-acquisition"
256	  readonly RBGC_LODE_VOUCH_SCHEMA="rbld-vouch-1"    # near-term unsigned, schema-versioned
257	
258	  # wsl-kind acquisition convention — NOT a resolved coordinate (see RBSLU). Per
259	  # the no-FQIN premise, intent stays declarative and the pipeline computes the
260	  # coordinate: underpin takes the substrate version as ARGUMENTS (release + point,
261	  # e.g. `24.04 4`); the host _capture function assembles the tarball URL from this
262	  # path-convention template, and the cloud step DISCOVERS the checksum at capture
263	  # — it fetches Canonical's published, GPG-signed SHA256SUMS, verifies the
264	  # signature against the pinned signing-key fingerprint below, then verifies the
265	  # rootfs bytes. No full URL and no digest are pinned here; advancing the version
266	  # is a different argument, not a constant edit. The template bets on Canonical's
267	  # cdimage path scheme staying stable — a fail-loud bet (a 404 / missing sums-line
268	  # dies clean). printf args: (release, release.point, arch).
269	  #
270	  # Palisade note (RBSLU): the paddock named cloud-images.ubuntu.com/wsl/, but that
271	  # path retired its checksummed-tarball publication — noble/ now ships only
272	  # .manifest files and a Store-delivered .wsl. Ubuntu Base (cdimage) is the
273	  # genuinely-checksummed, GPG-signed, wsl --import-shaped Canonical equivalent.
274	  # Acquisition-only this heat, so the distro flavor is not load-bearing; the
275	  # WSL-specific seed is a consumption-time re-pin (wsl --import deferred — see
276	  # RBSLU, paddock Heat nature). The signing fingerprint is per-source: re-pin it
277	  # with any source change. Retire the note if the wsl/ tarball publication returns.
278	  readonly RBGC_LODE_WSL_URL_TEMPLATE="https://cdimage.ubuntu.com/ubuntu-base/releases/%s/release/ubuntu-base-%s-base-%s.tar.gz"
279	  readonly RBGC_LODE_WSL_ARCH_DEFAULT="amd64"
280	  # Ubuntu CD Image Automatic Signing Key (2012, RSA4096), cdimage@ubuntu.com —
281	  # signs cdimage SHA256SUMS.gpg. The trust anchor: tiny, stable, auditable. The
282	  # cloud step fetches the key BY this fingerprint into a clean keyring, so the
283	  # keyserver is never trusted — only a signature from exactly this key passes.
284	  readonly RBGC_LODE_WSL_SIGNING_FPR="843938DF228D22F7B3742BC0D94AA3F0EFE21092"
285	
286	  # podvm-kind acquisition convention — NOT resolved coordinates (see RBSLI). Per
287	  # the no-FQIN premise, intent stays declarative and the pipeline resolves leaf
288	  # digests at capture: immure takes the quay FAMILY and the podman VERSION as
289	  # arguments (e.g. `podvm-wsl 5.6`); the cloud select step reads the family's
290	  # multi-arch OCI index at that version and picks the curated {disktype × arch}
291	  # leaves below from the index child DESCRIPTOR's platform.architecture +
292	  # annotations.disktype — never the layer filename, which is unreliable (the 5.6
293	  # wsl x86_64 leaf is titled `5.0-rootfs-amd64.tar.zst`; memo-20260608 §3.4). No
294	  # digest is pinned; advancing the version is a different argument, not a constant
295	  # edit. Trust grade is recorded-at-acquisition — quay rotates podvm out within
296	  # days and publishes no durable checksum, so RB attests only the digest captured.
297	  #
298	  # Two quay families, one verb (immure spans both via the family argument). The
299	  # disktype leaves carry the ALT arch spelling (x86_64/aarch64), not the OCI
300	  # amd64/arm64 the plain container children use — selection keys on that spelling.
301	  readonly RBGC_LODE_PODVM_FAMILY_WSL="quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl"
302	  readonly RBGC_LODE_PODVM_FAMILY_NATIVE="quay.io/podman/machine-os"
303	  # Curated leaf selection per family — declarative `disktype:arch` rows the select
304	  # step matches against index child descriptors. THIS PACE proves the podvm-wsl
305	  # family end-to-end (both wsl-disktype leaves -> a genuine 2-member Lode, which
306	  # exercises the multi-member machinery and the per-member-jettison path). The
307	  # native family's full 8-leaf curation and a same-version "widen the set" refresh
308	  # mode are the FOLLOWING pace (RBSL "Why podvm kinds retain selectively"); the
309	  # native default below is the modest 2-leaf set the cerebro experiment captured
310	  # (memo-20260608 §5) — the verb works for native, but only podvm-wsl is fixture-
311	  # proven. Member tag composes as :<sprue><disktype>-<arch> (e.g. rbi_wsl-x86_64);
312	  # disktype+arch are RB-selected from the index, so sprued.
313	  readonly RBGC_LODE_PODVM_WSL_SELECTION="wsl:x86_64 wsl:aarch64"
314	  readonly RBGC_LODE_PODVM_NATIVE_SELECTION="qemu:x86_64 wsl:x86_64"
315	
316	  # rbi_df layout: flat namespace. No subdirs. Each filename names one
317	  # depot-scoped artifact; tag varies by artifact role.
318	  #
319	  # Current artifacts:
320	  #   probe-tether:probe   — tether pool levy-time capability probe
321	  #                          (cloud-pushed marker image, FROM scratch)
322	  #   probe-airgap:probe   — airgap pool levy-time capability probe
323	  #                          (cloud-pushed marker image, FROM scratch)
324	  #   rbrd:tripwire        — depot regime tripwire (FROM-scratch image
325	  #                          carrying rbmm_moorings/rbrd.env). Host-inscribed by
326	  #                          Payor at end of levy; pulled + byte-diffed
327	  #                          by every cloud-submitting command. See
328	  #                          Tools/rbk/rbndb_base.sh.
329	  #
330	  # The depot-time-immutable identity and pool settings (CLOUD_PREFIX,
331	  # DEPOT_MONIKER, GCP_REGION, GCB_MACHINE_TYPE) live in the RBRD regime
332	  # and are also inscribed into rbi_df at the rbrd:tripwire tag so post-
333	  # levy drift can be detected at every subsequent cloud submission.
334	  #
335	  # Enumerators (rbw-iah / rbw-iar) ignore rbi_df by design — its
336	  # contents are operational, not part of the hallmark/reliquary
337	  # image catalogue.
338	
339	  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
340	  # Canonical tool names under rbi_rq/<date>/. Authoritative
341	  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
342	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
343	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
344	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
345	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
346	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
347	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"
348	  # gcrane joins the cohort so sealed-reliquary-consuming captures (bole/wsl)
349	  # resolve a PINNED gcrane builder from the reliquary, never the floating gcr.io

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Lode - reliquary body (guard-free cluster, sourced by rbld0_Lode):
20	#   conclave — convene the build-tool cohort into a Lode (Director credentials)
21	# The reliquary rides the capture-assembly spine (rblds_): this body owns only the
22	# kind-specific data — the conclave recipe (gcrane cohort capture + vouch-push),
23	# the substitutions blob, and the touchmark-fact extract — and composes
24	# them through zrbld_spine_dispatch / zrbld_spine_extract. No build-submission or
25	# step-composition machinery lives here.
26	#
27	# Conclave absorbs today's inscribe pull machinery (rbfli_Inscribe + rbgji01),
28	# retargeted from the rbi_rq/<date>/<tool> sibling-package layout to one rbi_ld
29	# package holding N member tags (:rbi_<tool>) plus the :rbi_vouch envelope. Both
30	# steps ride the floating gcrane builder (ZRBLD_GCRANE_BUILDER): the tools captured
31	# here ARE the reliquary, so capture cannot bootstrap from one — conclave is the
32	# generation phase the pinning rule permits to run unpinned (RBS0 rbsk_pinning_boundary).
33	
34	set -euo pipefail
35	
36	# Conclave is capture-pure: it writes no consumer config. It hands the captured
37	# touchmark to a later explicit yoke-stamp election (the reliquary cutover, a
38	# separate pace) through two bare single-form chaining facts
39	# (RBF_FACT_LODE_TOUCHMARK + RBF_FACT_LODE_BRAND/RBGC_LODE_BRAND_RELIQUARY). The
40	# provenance envelope lives only in GAR (:rbi_vouch tag, pushed cloud-side by
41	# rbgjl02), never host-side.
42	
43	######################################################################
44	# Internal Helpers (zrbld_*)
45	
46	# Internal: compose the conclave capture recipe (gcrane cohort capture + vouch-push)
47	# and its substitutions blob, then ride the capture spine to submit
48	# and poll. The spine owns the capture-domain build knobs (mason SA, TETHER pool,
49	# regime timeout); this body chooses only the recipe, the substitutions, and the
50	# inscribe-borrowed poll ceiling (the cohort copy needs the larger ceiling — same
51	# work inscribe performs today).
52	# Args: token stamp
53	zrbld_conclave_submit() {
54	  zrbld_sentinel
55	
56	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"
57	  local -r z_stamp="${2:?Stamp required}"
58	
59	  buc_step "Constructing conclave capture recipe"
60	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
61	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
62	
63	  # Recipe rows: script_path|builder_image|id|entrypoint, pre-resolved for the
64	  # spine. Both steps ride the floating gcrane builder (busybox entrypoint —
65	  # gcrane:debug's only shell) — no reliquary bootstrap (conclave IS what captures
66	  # the reliquary tools; generation-tier, the one phase allowed unpinned).
67	  local -r z_recipe=(
68	    "${ZRBLD_RBGJL_STEPS_DIR}/rbgjl03-conclave-capture.sh|${ZRBLD_GCRANE_BUILDER}|conclave-capture|busybox"
69	    "${ZRBLD_RBGJL_STEPS_DIR}/rbgjl02-assemble-push-vouch.sh|${ZRBLD_GCRANE_BUILDER}|assemble-push-vouch|busybox"
70	  )
71	
72	  buc_log_args "Composing conclave substitutions blob"
73	  local -r z_subs_file="${ZRBLD_CONCLAVE_PREFIX}subs.json"
74	  jq -n \
75	    --arg zjq_gar_host     "${z_gar_host}" \
76	    --arg zjq_gar_path     "${z_gar_path}" \
77	    --arg zjq_lodes_root   "${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}" \
78	    --arg zjq_tag_sprue    "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_SPRUE}" \
79	    --arg zjq_tag_vouch    "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH}" \
80	    --arg zjq_trust_grade  "${RBGC_LODE_TRUST_VERIFIED}" \
81	    --arg zjq_vouch_schema "${RBGC_LODE_VOUCH_SCHEMA}" \
82	    --arg zjq_acquired_by  "${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}" \
83	    --arg zjq_stamp        "${z_stamp}" \
84	    '{
85	      _RBGL_GAR_HOST:     $zjq_gar_host,
86	      _RBGL_GAR_PATH:     $zjq_gar_path,
87	      _RBGL_LODES_ROOT:   $zjq_lodes_root,
88	      _RBGL_TAG_SPRUE:    $zjq_tag_sprue,
89	      _RBGL_TAG_VOUCH:    $zjq_tag_vouch,
90	      _RBGL_TRUST_GRADE:  $zjq_trust_grade,
91	      _RBGL_VOUCH_SCHEMA: $zjq_vouch_schema,
92	      _RBGL_ACQUIRED_BY:  $zjq_acquired_by,
93	      _RBGL_LODE_STAMP:   $zjq_stamp
94	    }' > "${z_subs_file}" \
95	    || buc_die "Failed to compose conclave substitutions blob"
96	
97	  zrbld_spine_dispatch \
98	    "${z_token}" "${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}" "Conclave" "${ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_INSCRIBE}" \
99	    "${z_subs_file}" "${ZRBLD_CONCLAVE_PREFIX}" \
100	    "${z_recipe[@]}"
101	}
102	
103	# Internal: extract the captured touchmark from the completed conclave build and
104	# emit the two bare single-form chaining facts (touchmark value + kind-brand
105	# enum). The capture step (step 0) authors the base64 JSON carrying the
106	# host-minted stamp in slot_1; the vouch-push step writes no output. Conclave
107	# captures exactly one Lode (the cohort is one package), so exactly one slot is
108	# populated. The provenance envelope is NOT read host-side: it lives only in GAR
109	# (rbgjl02 pushed it under :rbi_vouch), so the host hands forward only the
110	# touchmark a consumer needs.
111	zrbld_conclave_extract() {
112	  zrbld_sentinel
113	
114	  buc_step "Extracting capture results from build step outputs"
115	
116	  local -r z_output_file="${ZRBLD_CONCLAVE_PREFIX}output.json"
117	  zrbld_spine_extract 0 "${z_output_file}"
118	
119	  buc_log_args "Conclave output:"
120	  buc_log_pipe < "${z_output_file}"
121	
122	  local -r z_stamp_file="${ZRBLD_CONCLAVE_PREFIX}stamp.txt"
123	  jq -r '.slot_1.stamp // empty' "${z_output_file}" > "${z_stamp_file}" \
124	    || buc_die "Failed to read reliquary stamp from conclave output"
125	  local -r z_stamp=$(<"${z_stamp_file}")
126	  test -n "${z_stamp}" || buc_die "Conclave output carried no stamp in slot_1"
127	
128	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_LODE_TOUCHMARK}" "${z_stamp}" \
129	    || buc_die "Failed to write touchmark fact for ${z_stamp}"
130	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_LODE_BRAND}" "${RBGC_LODE_BRAND_RELIQUARY}" \
131	    || buc_die "Failed to write kind-brand fact for ${z_stamp}"
132	  buc_success "Conclave captured Lode ${z_stamp} — touchmark fact emitted (${RBGC_LODE_BRAND_RELIQUARY})"
133	}
134	
135	######################################################################
136	# External Functions (rbld_*)
137	
138	rbld_conclave() {
139	  zrbld_sentinel
140	
141	  buc_doc_brief "Convene the build-tool cohort into one Lode (reliquary kind, rbi_ld capture)"
142	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
143	
144	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
145	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
146	
147	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
148	  local z_token=""
149	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
150	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
151	
152	  # Mint the Lode stamp on the host: <kind-letter><YYMMDDHHMMSS>. The host owns
153	  # the stamp so the touchmark is known before the build for the capture-file.
154	  # The reliquary kind-letter 'r' matches the legacy inscribe datestamp prefix,
155	  # but the namespaces differ (rbi_ld vs rbi_rq), so no collision.
156	  local -r z_stamp="${RBGC_LODE_KIND_RELIQUARY}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}"
157	
158	  buc_info "Lode: ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_stamp}"
159	
160	  zrbld_conclave_submit "${z_token}" "${z_stamp}"
161	  zrbld_conclave_extract
162	
163	  buc_success "Conclave complete: build-tool cohort -> ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_stamp}"
164	}
165	
166	# eof
